profile.name: playwright

intro.title: 🎭 Playwright
intro.desc: Playwright is a framework for web automation and testing. It drives Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API — in your tests, in your scripts, and as a tool for AI agents.

install_hints: | **[Playwright CLI](#playwright-cli)** | Coding agents (Claude Code, Copilot) | `npm i -g @playwright/cli@latest` |
| **[Playwright Library](#playwright-library)** | Browser automation scripts | `npm i playwright` |

detalle.name: playwright
detalle.desc: Playwright is a framework for web automation and testing. It drives Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit with a single API — in your tests, in your scripts, and as a tool for AI agents.
detalle.avoid_if: ya tienes una herramienta equivalente o no encaja con tu stack actual
